TIPP Insights
America's Pollster | tippinsights.com

Methodology: Sample: 1,159 Likely Voters | Fielded April 22-24, 2026 | Online

Sample Breakdown
Totals  Men  Women  White  Black  Hispanic  Asian  18-44  45-64  65+  Rep  Dem  Ind
% of Sample  100%   47%    53%    66%    13%     14%       4%    32%    40%    28%    37%  35%  28%

Generic Congressional Ballot
If the election for Congress were held today, would you vote for the
Democratic candidate or the Republican candidate in your district?

By Race
White  Black  Hispanic  Asian
Democratic candidate   39%    82%     54%      48%
Republican candidate   52%    10%     34%      40%
Undecided/Other         9%     8%     12%      12%

By Gender
Men  Women
Democratic candidate   43%   52%
Republican candidate   48%   39%
Undecided/Other         9%    9%

By Age
18-44  45-64  65+
Democratic candidate   56%    44%   42%
Republican candidate   35%    47%   49%
Undecided/Other         9%     9%    9%

By Party
Rep  Dem  Ind
Democratic candidate    8%   91%   45%
Republican candidate   86%    5%   42%
Undecided/Other         6%    4%   13%
